title: Amazon Scientists Just Found the Zombie Spider
script: This spider is the zombie? A team working in the Ecuadorian Amazon just described Taczanowskia waska, a new orb-weaver spider that does something no other animal on record has ever done: it mimics a Cordyceps zombie fungus. You know Cordyceps. It's the real fungus that takes over insects' brains and kills them. Other animals in the forest recognize infected bugs and flee. This spider figured out it can impersonate that infection, painting itself to look like a diseased corpse, so predators avoid it on instinct. It also plays completely motionless for minutes at a time to sell the act. Researchers call it the first known case of a non-fungus mimicking a pathogen to survive. So how do you outsmart a spider pretending to already be dead?

shots.phrase: This Ecuadorian Amazon spider is the zombie
Other animals flee from infected bugs
Researchers confirm first case of pathogen mimicry
